news.news: Immunocore presented updated Phase 1 data for brenetafusp, a PRAME-targeted ImmTAC bispecific antibody, showing an 87% 6-month overall survival rate in heavily pretreated advanced melanoma. The data supports the selection of a 160 mcg dose for the ongoing Phase 3 PRISM-MEL-301 trial evaluating brenetafusp in combination with nivolumab.

Tune Therapeutics presented positive Phase 1b/2a proof-of-concept data for TUNE-401, an epigenetic silencer utilizing its TEMPO platform to directly silence HBV cccDNA. The study demonstrated durable antiviral activity and biomarker loss in patients with chronic hepatitis B, with plans to advance the candidate into a larger Phase 2 trial in late 2026.
